entry.title: The 'or' operation is not working across different property names when using substringof
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I'm currently working with an OData service and have encountered a limitation that I'm hoping to get some help with.

Here's the context: I'm using the following OData query to filter data based on specific conditions:

$filter=substringof('stann', Email) or substringof('stann', FormattedName)&$format=json

it seems like the or operation is not working across different property names when using substringof. Has anyone experienced a similar issue, and if so, were you able to find a workaround or fix? Is there a specific syntax or method in OData that I might be missing?

The Error I'm receiving is

"error": {
        "code": "ERROR",
        "message": {
            "lang": "en",
            "value": "Error in filter System Query, Operation failed::Operands of logical operator '' are not valid"
        }
    }

entry.title: Re: Business Partner Section
entry.content:
Hello Team,

Issue is resolved by executing the T-code BUSP.

We need to generate the screen container.

entry.title: Re: Excel file generated via xco_cp_xlsx is not opening when sent over Email
entry.content: Please check SAP Notes or contact SAP Support.

entry.title: Re: Decimals in quantity
entry.content: That is a very good proposal. However it doesn't bring more decimals. It rather brings more precision with the same decimals.

entry.title: Re: S_ALR_87013326 - Account not included
entry.content:
From FBL3N display one of the documents and navigate to other FI-CO documents via menu Environment, Accountings documents, Profit center,If no CO / document:

  • Check if GL account was fully defined (cost element, etc.)
  • Compare the recent created GL account with an older one

entry.title: Re: ERP-EWM integration Error with Message# /SCWM/EEC_CHECK023
entry.content: Me too have same error if u find please share with me!

entry.title: Regarding CSS ID when developing SAP CAP
entry.content:
I am working on applying css during cap development.

On the screen, press F12 to copy 'id' or 'class' and use it,
Can't I change this id and class name myself? Do I have to use it as set on the sap system?

Please let me know if you know how I can change the 'id' and 'class'. Thank you.

entry.title: Re: 10 Steps to Clean Core for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition for Customers
entry.content:
Hi Dennis,
thanks for your comment and interest. Unfortunately, we can currently only offer this bootcamp for customers and partners. I'm not aware of any other public offering we currently would have going into the depth that we cover in this bootcamp, sorry. Best regards, Thomas

entry.title: Re: Edit IN MM01/MM01 FIELD MBEW-BKLAS
entry.content:
For Customizing look at OMSK

  • Links between account category reference, valuation, class and material type.

If the result is unsatisfactory,

  • Look at BAdi BADI_MATERIAL_REF to provide a default valuation class from material type.
  • You could also add a check in BAdI BADI_MATERIAL_CHECK

entry.title: Re: Ejecución Masiva de Nomina, no sale completo el resultado
entry.content:
Hola!

trata de ejecutarlo en proceso de fondo y sin crear log. Pueden ser muchos factores los que te pueden crear esa inconsistencia, problemas de performance, acceso a base de datos, user_exits, badis que a lo mejor no resetean los valores, etc etc

Saludos!

Johnatan Gomez

entry.title: Re: How to report issue on UI5 control
entry.content:
If its a OpenUI5 Control you can open a issue in the GitHub Repo:
https://github.com/SAP/openui5 

If its a SAPUI5 Control you have to open a Ticket:
https://me.sap.com/servicessupport

entry.title: Re: Problem with Geo-coodinates colums
entry.content:
in DSP doing a data preview of the dimension (in view and in AM) you can see the Location field and its values, like POINT (7235766.90155 3895303.9634).

In SAC I think that only the Map object can see and use the field.

Regards,

entry.title: Re: Search help restrictions fields are disabled for input.
entry.content:
Don't check all the boxes in the definition.

  • You have checked the “display only” box, uncheck it if you want user to be allowed to change received search criteria
  • Did you also actually change the data element to use a different data element that the one of the selection method (view) if this is not the case uncheck this one too.

entry.title: How to Upload Payment Advices in app Manage Payment Advices?
entry.content:
The requirement is to upload the payment advice in the app Manage Payment Advices.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to Upload Payment Advices in app Manage Payment A...
entry.content:
According to Manage Payment Advices and Manage Payment Advices (New Version), with this app, you can create payment advices manually. You can also view, edit, and delete existing payment advices.

If Machine Learning is enabled for your account, you can use this app to import payment advices from PDF, TIFF, JPG, PNG, and XLS files.

You can follow the steps below to activate this functionality:

First, you need to purchase the license for SAP Cash Application.

Then, enable the upload functionality by following How to Configure the Communication System for SAP_COM_0657, as well as How to Create the Communication Arrangement for SAP_COM_0657.

Finally, follow the steps described in How to Upload Payment Advices.

 

Note: You can check the supported language of Payment Advice Extraction in Availability.

entry.title: Can we auto select employee from one calibration session to the next one.
entry.content:
Can we auto select employee from one calibration session to the next one which will reduce the work/time to select same employees multiple times.

If a performance form includes two calibration steps for the same set of employees, and we select this group for the first calibration session, will we need to reselect the employees for the second session? Ideally, the system should automatically retain the selected employees for the second calibration.

Is it possible? If no, then kindly suggest with the best workaround possible.

entry.title: Re: Develop and deploy an Angular app on SAP BTP (Cloud Foundry) with On-premises OData
entry.content:
Hi arnabdatta3

Just change the following content in src/cf/xs-app.json, it will need user login to visit the angular application in BTP Cloud foundry.

{
"source": "/*",
"localDir": "./",
"scope": ["$XSAPPNAME.Display", "$XSAPPNAME.Edit"]
}
 
Best regards!
Jacky Liu

entry.title: Re: fiori elements of worklist and list report page under service modeler copy functionality not dis
entry.content: where is the reference picture from? maybe V2 and V4 difference?

entry.title: Re: Business Network for Logistics - Freight Collaboration: Understanding the Settlement Process

It looks like the invoice is created without the freight PO and SES? Also, you mentioned that the flow involved in the handling of disputes in the shipper’s TM system is different. Do you have a blog on that? Cheers.

entry.title: Re: this.getOwnerComponent() is undefined on ObjectPage c...
entry.content:
I´m using following code which should be same as "this.getOwnerComponent().createComponent({...":

// Fiori elements V2
this.getView().getController().getOwnerComponent().createComponent({

// Fiori elements V4
this.editFlow.getView().getController().getAppComponent().createComponent({

entry.title: Re: How to send SAP data to Advanced Event Mesh in 15 minutes, code-less
entry.content:
Hi @loather,

Yes, you can use a database view, CDS view, or even a transparent table directly in your Outbound Object configuration or insert these into Payload Designer. While creating DB views through SE11 is a familiar option, it doesn’t offer more control compared to Payload Designer. Payload Designer provides enhanced functionality, including support for left outer joins - something not possible with standard database views created via SE11, where only inner joins are available.

Regarding the alias issue you mentioned: this has been resolved in a later service pack. I recommend upgrading to the latest service pack to address it.

If you encounter additional issues, you can report them through the Support System.

entry.title: Re: how to deal with extension of BAPI BAPI_RESERVATION_C...
entry.content:
Theorically, you have to implement BAdI MB_RES_BAPI_CHANGE then use this parameter in the implementation

  • Just provide in the extensionin parameter the key fields required to get correct record ans the append structure zz fields values
  • Use a class CL_ABAP_CONTAINER_UTILITIES to map values between extension structure and your abap structure

BUT 😥

  • You must be a SAP employee to use the BAdI so look for some enhancement in the BAPI code
  • Replicate the SAP reserved code in (example) Enh ES_SAPLMB_BUS2093 Popint BAPI_RESERVATION_CHANGE_G7

entry.title: solved
entry.content: solved

entry.title: Re: XSLT Transformation and standard text for ROUTING_CREATE
entry.content: Okay so you didn't create any XSLT yet, and you're asking what you should do.

entry.title: 雜項收發物料
entry.content:
大家好

請問S4HC內是否有類似ByDesign"成本中心耗用/成本中心退貨"的app用於雜項收發物料

我有找到一個app是"管理庫存"，庫存更改有三個選項能選，其中第一個"初始輸入項"用起來類似於雜收，但我希望能自己選擇成本中心與總帳科目。請問大家雜項收發在S4HC上都是用哪個app?

entry.title: Triggering Where-Used List for Usages of CDS Annotation
entry.content:
Imagine, you want to add a CDS annotation to a data definition. Before you do that, you want to know in which CDS objects this annotation is already used. Let’s start searching usages of CDS annotations using ABAP development tools for Eclipse (ADT) as of client version 3.46 and SAP BTP ABAP environment 2411 / SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2502.

In this sample, you want to see in which CDS objects the @AccessControl.authorizationCheck annotation is used

Firstly, position the cursor on the relevant annotation and then choose Get Where-Used List from the context menu or just Ctrl+Shift+G for MS Windows or Command+Shift+G for Mac users.

The Where-Used List pre-execution dialog is opened.

Select the relevant object types for which you want to see the usages and choose Finish.

The where-used list is opened in the Search view and displays the search result as a list. Here, the relevant objects are alphabetically listed in accordance to their type.

You can modify how the list should be displayed and structured. To do this, the integrated toolbar offers you helpful features. As if it was not enough, you can also navigate to the object where the annotation is used by double-clicking it.

entry.title: somebody tech me these...
entry.content:
account management
D-01 How do Use by changing the end of the basic log, etc. ?
D-02 How do Use after removing unnecessary accounts from the database or setting a lock.?
D-03 How do Set special use period and council diagram to suit the institution's needs?
D-04 How do To deny database administrator privileges, you must grant privileges to accounts and groups.?
D-12 How do Set password reuse restrictions?
D-13 How do DB user accounts were individually granted.?
access management
D-05 How do Restriction of access to DB server from remote location?
D-06 How do Prevent unauthorized users other than DBA from accessing system tables?
D-07 How do In case of Oracle database, set the listener password and use it.?
D-14 How do Use by removing unnecessary ODBC/OLE-DB data sources and drives?
D-15 How do Setting a lockout policy for a certain number of login failures?
D-16 How do Set the UMASK of the DB account to 022 or higher to protect key files in the database.?
D-17 How do Access rights to key files such as key configuration files and password files in the database are set appropriately.?
D-18 How do Restrict changes to the listener log and trace files by accessing the Oracle listener by users other than the administrator.?
option management
D-08 How do Adjust the Role of the application or DBA account so that it is not set to Public.?
D-09 How do Set OS_ROLES, REMOTE_OS_AUTHENTICATION, REMOTE_OS_ROLES to FALSE?
D-19 How do Password confirmation function is set and applied?
D-20 How do Existence of unauthorized Object Owner?
D-21 How do Restrictions on unauthorized use of GRANT OPTION?
D-22 How do Set the resource limit feature of the database to TRUE?
patch management
D-10 How do Apply all latest security patches and vendor recommendations to your database?
D-11 How do Set audit records such as database access, change, and deletion to suit the organization's audit record policy.?
D-23 How do Use a non-secure version of the database?

entry.title: Re: HowTo use 3rd party lib with content-security-policy...
entry.content: @Ludovico you have to exclude all the lib from component preload to make it work. You have to do it in ui5.yaml and ui5-deploy.yaml.

entry.title: SAP analytics cloud - How can i filter a story based on the logged in user department
entry.content:
Hi experts,

For my time and attendance report and i have a dimension for userId and another dimension for department name. i want to filter the story or page by the logged in userId department.

i got the logged in user in a variable called loggedInUser.

var loggedInUser = Application.getUserInfo().displayName;

Any idea how to achieve this ?

A.K

SAP Analytics Cloud, analytics designer 

SAP Analytics Cloud

entry.title: Mandatory fields in Fiori condition based
entry.content:
Hi Community,

we did a customizing to make the Fields Defect Type VIQMFE.FEGRP and Short Text Damage Code RIWO00.TXTCDFE mandatory for a specific Notificationtype.

In ERP everything is working well, also when a Repair Order inclusive notification is technically completed the System complains about the missing values.

But how can we get it work in Fiori App F2023 that the Defect Type and Short Text Damage Code are treated there also mandatory for a specific Notification Type.

Kind Regards

Marcus

entry.title: How to average daily volume of purchase requisition
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We would like to know if there is any specific MRP setting could help average the daily purchase requisition quantities of raw materials.

[ASIS]:  We are using PPDS heuristic to generate supply data. Due to business requirement planned order tends to concentrated on Monday/Friday, therefore Purchase requisition mainly generated in beginning/end of the week. So, raw materials receiving workload is high on Monday/Friday, while there are seldom receiving work from Tuesday ~ Thursday.

[Goal]:  Averaging daily Purchase requisition Qty from Monday to Tuesday. Leveling daily receiving workload of Raw materials. 

MRP view1 

Advance planning 

Best Regards,

Hus

SCM APO SAP LiveCache   

SCM APO Production Planning and Detailed Scheduling (PP/DS)

best regards

entry.title: Re: SAP Commissions - Under the hood of Stage-hooks
entry.content:
@tonyturtle8794 

Yes available in GCP with stored procedure...  Have you tried Plugin query which will solve without need of stagehook

https://community.sap.com/t5/human-capital-management-blogs-by-sap/how-to-use-plugin-s-efficiently-to-derive-your-calculations/ba-p/13491693

entry.title: IAS - sending different email templates per country
entry.content:
Hello,

we have a requirement for one of our clients to send different email templates depending on the country of the Onboardee.

We created a custom email template set for Onboardees and configured different versions depending on the language, but this depends on the language that the user's browser is set to (so if your browswer is set in English US, you get the email in English US etc.).

In this case we need to be able to send a different email template depending on the country of the onboardee. Example: the client employees in India have the browser set in English US, but we need to send a different text (still in English US) because the onboarding procedure in that country is different from other countries so they need to send different instructions.

is it possible to import the country of the onboardee and use it as a condition to trigger a different welcome email? how can we add the country in IPS transformations?

thanks

Marco

entry.title: Re: Stock Transport for Quality Stock (with Inspection Lot) and Blocked Stock

Excited to be here!!!

entry.title: Re: How to Guide Step by Step on Analysis Process Designer (APD)

entry.title: Re: Step by step Analysis Process Design

An informative  article! I would love it if you could provide an example of an APD using a scoring model, such as linear regression

Best regards

entry.title: Re: Got error creating HANA service
entry.content: Worked for me, thanks!

entry.title: Re: Can I extend a certain app? With Clean Core? How?
entry.content:
Hi @RajendraP 

First of, not all available fields are on the UI. Start by going to your Fiori app, navigate to the screen you want more fields on and enter "Adapt UI" mode. Right-click where you want to add a field and choose the plus icon ( + ) Add Fields. There you will see a list of available fields, currently not on the screen.

If it wasn't there, it depends on the business context. You could try to use Data Source Extension tab in Custom Fields. That key user extensibility lets you add existing fields into the data structure. However, that will not work for all use cases and you only have access to CDS views already associated. But that would be the next thing to check.

Lastly, Developer Extensibility. Check the source of the app, starting with the OData service and down to the data layer. Depending how the app was built (newer or old), you have more option. If the data structure is based on CDS views, you can check in ADT the the Extend Release contract C0. If the CDS is released for extension you can create your own CDS view which extends the standard one, including the fields you need (this is now super short summarized, this needs to be done proper and correct - there are guides out there on how to extend a RAP BO).

entry.title: How to bypass a 502 Bad Gateway - ResponseWithBody error thrown by the API Gateway?
entry.content:
Hello all,

One of our API proxies is returning an HTTP 502 Bad Gateway - ResponseWithBody response. This is due to the API Gateway considering the response of the API provider incorrect, as it contains an "Content-Encoding" header along with an HTTP 204 response code, which is not a correct HTTP response according to the RFC 7231, section 6.3.5: 204 No Content.

Because the fix on API provider side will take several months to be deployed, we would like to temporarily bypass the error and "force" the response received by the API provider being sent back to the API consumer.

We have tried different solutions without success:

  • Removing the problematic HTTP header from the response using an AssignMessage policy in the response PreFflow of the target endpoint.
  • Forcing the response code to 204 in an AssignMessage policy called from the <FaultRules> section of both the proxy and target endpoints
  • By calling the API provider using a service callout instead of a target endpoint.

Unfortunately, none of these solutions works, and the HTTP 502 Bad Gateway - ResponseWithBody is still being returned by the API proxy.

Is it possible to bypass this error and force the reponse to a specific HTTP code ?

Thanks

entry.title: I need to add a field in FCC in receiver channel for csv along with the incoming array from Source
entry.content:
The problem is data from source has field and an array .SO when mapping to FCC in receiver channel for creating CSV,the one field mapped is coming only once but the array lines are coming multiple times

 

WH_NO|IBD|ITEM_NO|BATCH|SKU|QUANTITY|MFG_DATE|EXPIRY_DATE|STOR_TYPE|STOR_SEC|BIN|SUG
0390657434
|1||BNTFR100-Q0|900|10.11.2024|10.11.2027||||M
|2||BNTFR200-Q0|900|10.11.2024|10.11.2027||||M

I need below.0390657434 is not coming in array but outside array

WH_NO|IBD|ITEM_NO|BATCH|SKU|QUANTITY|MFG_DATE|EXPIRY_DATE|STOR_TYPE|STOR_SEC|BIN|SUG
|0390657434|1||BNTFR100-Q0|900|10.11.2024|10.11.2027||||M
|0390657434|2||BNTFR200-Q0|900|10.11.2024|10.11.2027||||M
|0390657434|3||BNTFR100-81|820|10.11.2024|10.11.2027||||M

entry.title: Re: How to get the error details in SAP CPI when calling via HTTPS?
entry.content: Please see some SAP help poages regarding this here: https://help.sap.com/docs/cloud-integration/sap-cloud-integration/handle-errors-gracefully what fits to your use case best should be the scenario here: https://help.sap.com/docs/cloud-integration/sap-cloud-integration/don-t-throw-exception-on-failure

entry.title: IDES ECC6 EHP8 working - ADS adobe / JAVA STACK issue
entry.content:
Hello,
I own an IDES ECC6 EHP8 home server for my personal use and for personal training purposes (mainly abap training).


This server is a VMWARE image. Everything works perfectly, the only problem I have is that ADS doesn't work. When I want to learn adobe forms I have a problem because I can't activate my form and when I want to preview print I get an error message “soap runtime exception: csoapexceptiontransport : http receive failed with exception communicati on_failure (100.101).”

After my research someone told that this is an ADS and java stack configuration error and that I need to configure an additional java server to connect the ADS services.

I don't know anything about this, as it's a BASIS subject for which I have no expertise. Could someone help me via Anydesk or Teamviewer? I can pay for the service because I'm a junior and I really need it to improve my skills (I should point out that my consulting company doesn't have a sandbox server, unfortunately).

entry.title: Re: SAP Integration Suite - SQL Updata via JDBC Error
entry.content:
Hi,

you could create a SQL Server Profiler trace to see what is different in the statement from the system. See this note 929031 - Using SQL Server Profiler for JAVA (and ABAP) - SAP for Me for details on how to do it.

Best regards

   Clas Hortien

entry.title: Re: Internal Number range skip in vendor master upload us...
entry.content:
Dear Thangaraj,

It is possible that numbers will be skipped though buffering is off. 

Please find below SAP Note for additional details. 

1843002 - Gaps and jumps in number range assignment - SAP for Me

Regards,
Saravanan

entry.title: Re: Comparison of Users from SuccessFactors(odata) and Custom MDF using SAP CPI/CI
entry.content:
As an alternative solution, we can use the steps below to achieve the results:
Step 1: Combine both input payloads into a single message body through a content modifier:
<Root>
<SF_Data>
${property.SF_payload}
</SF_Data>
<MDF_Data>
${property.MDF_payload}
</MDF_Data>
</Root>
Step 2: Use the XSLT code below to achieve the desired output:

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<xsl:stylesheet version="1.0" xmlns:xsl="http://www.w3.org/1999/XSL/Transform">
<xsl:output method="xml" indent="yes" encoding="UTF-8" standalone="no"/>
<xsl:template match="/">
<RemovedUsers>
<xsl:for-each select="Root/SF_Data/JobRequisition/JobRequisitionOperator">
<xsl:variable name="currentUser" select="usersSysId"/>
<xsl:if test="not(//MDF_Data/JobRequisition/JobRequisitionOperator[usersSysId = $currentUser])">
<RemovedUser><xsl:value-of select="$currentUser"/></RemovedUser>
</xsl:if>
</xsl:for-each>
</RemovedUsers>
</xsl:template>
</xsl:stylesheet>

entry.title: FI Document Clearing
entry.content:
Dear experts hi,

My requirement is to get 2 or more existing open items of a customer and clear them using ABAP and the result to be a journal entry with no lines.

I have tried the POSTING_INTERFACE_CLEARING but this gets stuck in the Process Open Items screen. Doing some debugging i noticed that there isn't any step to activate the items and the FM expects to enter data in structure t_ftpost, but this is not my request since doing this will create another two lines debiting & crediting.

I am now trying to use AC_CLR_DOCUMENT_CREATE. I have managed to clear the documents but the generated document has a single line with zero amount either a customer or GL depending on how you feed the FM.

This is how the FM is filled:

ls_acchd-glvor = 'RFBU'.
ls_acchd-awtyp = 'BKPF'.
ls_acchd-tcode = 'FB1D'.
APPEND ls_acchd TO it_acchd.
CLEAR: ls_acchd.

g_posnr = 1.
ls_accit-bukrs = bukrs.
ls_accit-budat = sy-datum.
ls_accit-bldat = sy-datum.
ls_accit-wwert = sy-datum.
ls_accit-blart = 'SA'.
ls_accit-posnr = g_posnr.
ls_accit-bschl = '50'.
ls_accit-koart = 'S'.
ls_accit-hkont = gl_account.  
*  ls_accit-kunnr = kunnr.
*  ls_accit-bschl = '01'.
*  ls_accit-koart = 'D'.
ls_accit-pswsl = 'EUR'.
APPEND ls_accit TO it_accit.

ls_acccr-posnr = g_posnr.
ls_acccr-waers = 'EUR'.
ls_acccr-curtp = '00'.
APPEND ls_acccr TO it_acccr.

ls_acccr-posnr = g_posnr.
ls_acccr-waers = 'EUR'.
ls_acccr-curtp = '10'.
APPEND ls_acccr TO it_acccr.

LOOP AT it_documents INTO ls_lines.
  ls_accclr_itm_key-bukrs = bukrs.
  ls_accclr_itm_key-koart = 'D'.
  ls_accclr_itm_key-konko = kunnr.
  ls_accclr_itm_key-belnr = ls_lines-belnr.
  ls_accclr_itm_key-gjahr = ls_lines-gjahr.
  ls_accclr_itm_key-buzei = ls_lines-buzei.
  APPEND ls_accclr_itm_key TO it_accclr_itm_key.

  g_posnr = g_posnr + 1.
  CLEAR: ls_lines,ls_accit,ls_accclr_itm_key,ls_bseg.
ENDLOOP.
  CALL FUNCTION 'AC_CLR_DOCUMENT_CREATE'
    EXPORTING
      i_auglv                = 'EINGZAHL'
      i_koart                = 'D'
      i_bukrs                = bukrs
      i_konko                = kunnr
    TABLES
      t_acchd                = it_acchd
      t_accit                = it_accit
      t_acccr                = it_acccr
      t_accclr_itm_key       = it_accclr_itm_key
    EXCEPTIONS
      invalid_input          = 1
      invalid_selection      = 2
      account_missing        = 3
      account_not_oi_handled = 4
      account_locked         = 5
      document_locked        = 6
      account_clr_internally = 7
      OTHERS                 = 8.
  IF sy-subrc <> 0.
* Implement suitable error handling here
  ENDIF.

Do you know if there is any other solution for this? Batch Input is not an option.

Thank you,

entry.title: Re: Need direction on how to access CPI WebUI to download new key pair
entry.content: HI could you clarfiy where I can get the "Account Short Name" and the "Landscape Host" requested in https://help.sap.com/docs/cloud-integration/sap-cloud-integration/stable-url ?

entry.title: Re: SD: Trigger billing after GI posting
entry.content: Dear Rob, thank you! Unfortunatelly, we do not use LE-TRA. The second option is to trigger invoice creation using mnessage control? Could you please elaborate on how to do this? Maybe a misunderstanding? We would like to post the billing document as you would do in VF01 or VF04, not just print a paper document with "BILL" on it... The business requirement is to include the printed bill with the delivered goods. Thank you Jens

entry.title: Re: Breaking Barriers and Fighting Sexism: Lin’s Journey from a Salesgirl to an SAP Consultant

Simply add parameter URL 

 

 

Its OCI 4.0 kind regards

entry.title: Re: Latest Goals Management and Employees on LOA
entry.content: This is now supported as of 2H 2024.

entry.title: Re: How to send SAP data to Advanced Event Mesh in 15 minutes, code-less
entry.content:
Thanks again @Benedikt_Sprung , you are right about SE11 views, my mistake I thought they could do outer joins + joins with constant values.

Regarding support, I should mention we are using SAP ASANWEE version. Does ASAPIO support that or do I need to use SAP marketplace?

entry.title: Re: Weight not populated in storage bin if material is ma...
entry.content:
Hi @Eric_SAUTOT ,

did you also maintain the weight per UoM in the material master of the product? You will need to maintain there that 1 KG as a unit has the weight of 1 KG. This may sound redundant but there could also be the case, that a product is always packed in a certain way so 1 KG of the product might weigh more due than 1 KG due to the packaging.

Best regards,
Christian

entry.title: Re: Workflow Email Notification not triggered for condition contract
entry.content: Flexible or Standard Workflow

entry.title: Re: How to remove the SAP login in branded MDK app ?
entry.content: @Jitendra_Kansal right now we are migrating the android app to MDK app. In android app we use login process of entering user ID and which fetch the user details which have mobile number. On that number OTP sent, if both OTP matches then user login in. In our case customer does not have sap universal ID, so that users are unable to get login screen which we have developed for login. They stuck on the sap login screen, so that why we want skip SAP authorization screen.

entry.title: Re: Start learning to develop extensions for SAP Business One, Web client for customer implementatio
entry.content:
Here is the right link:

https://learning.sap.com/learning-journeys/developing-extensions-for-sap-business-one-and-the-web-client

entry.title: Re: HC300 deploying CVD_PD Error 170057 No visible output...
entry.content:
Hi DCR.
Could you please send me the code of your CVD_PD Calculation View?

In SAP Business Application Studio, please right-click the calculation view and choose Download, then attach the file to this thread.

Many thanks in advance.

Best regards,
Alain

entry.title: Is there a possibility to track changes made to Manage Role-Based Permission Access in Provisioning?
entry.content:
Hello Community,

I have a question regarding RBP and I was wondering if you know any workaround because, while searching KBAs I was not able to find any potential solution.

Change Audit Report for Manage Role-Based Permission Access page – as well known from User Interface we cannot export any audit report (KBA 3018751) is there a way to track/monitor any changes made on Manage Role-Based Permission Access from Provisioning?

Thank you in advance!

entry.title: Re: CSRF Token Missing Error in Android OData Service
entry.content: We are using an API for posting certain data. This API requires xcsrf token as a header parameter for successful post. But we are unable to generate xcsrf token in android. So, we want to ask is there any way to generate xcsrf token in android.

entry.title: Re: SAP BTP IAS (Identity Authentication) error when UI5...
entry.content:
Are you using incognito mode? I experienced the same issue in incognito/private mode, I suppose it is related to some data that is expected to be in the user's browser local storage and that is not available due to incognito restrictions.

Please make a try with a normal session and let us know if it works

Regards

Mattia

entry.title: Re: Is it possible to call an URL with automatic login?
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I also have the same query - where you able to get any solution for this?

entry.title: Re: How to send SAP data to Advanced Event Mesh in 15 minutes, code-less
entry.content:
Thank you as well for the good questions, @loather. 

To open an incident for the ASANWEE compinent, you can submit a ticket at the SAP Support Portal, as you mentioned.

entry.title: Re: Download path of Payment Media in Public Cloud
entry.content: Is there a answer to this question? The main reply does definetly not answer the question in the post.

entry.title: Query for GL balance carryforward Function
entry.content:
whether SAP standard function can support below business requirement: G/L account book some journal voucher in special period 13-16, when do balance carryforward, just carryforward G/L account balance in Period 1-12 to next year.

as I know, carryforward is executed by year, can't choose period.

entry.title: Re: how to delete condition table (C901)
entry.content:
Hello @weijinxing 

You should not have deleted the tables in SE11. Delete them from configuration settings. What kind of conditions are they?

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Re: Finding the right CDS Extractor in SAP S/4HANA
entry.content:
Hi Frank,

is there an option to include archived data (archived via SARA) in CDS views for extraction? That way it would be possible to have a abstraction layer for all data.

Best regards,
Jens

entry.title: Travel Expenses posting
entry.content:
Hi Expert, 

we are facing an issue on posting of travel expenses in SAP S/4HANA. 

We have created trips and approved them throug ACTEXP_APPR_LITE. I can see in this transaction the expenses approved and with:

  • "Request/Trip" Column = Trip Approved
  • "Settlement" Column = To be settled

I have checked the trip and the settlement has a WBS assigned,

But when i run the PRFI transaction nothing was reported in accounting. 

Could you help me? Is there another transaction to perform the allocation in controlling/accounting?

Thanks

Armando

entry.title: Re: Edit IN MM01/MM01 FIELD MBEW-BKLAS
entry.content: OMSK defines a link between a material type and allowed valuation classes. You don't need to implement a BAdI for that.

entry.title: Crystal Reports Shows all text compressed
entry.content:
One of my older reports recently started showing all text compressed on one line, both in Design and Preview.

When I export however, all text is displayed correctly. Also when I edit a text box, the text is shown somewhat correct (though it is cut off at the end).

How can I fix this?

SAP Crystal Reports 2016 Support Pack 6
Version 14.2.6.2839

entry.title: Ariba Buying, Base Edition - Is it possible to add Mercateo instead of Amazon as Marketplace?
entry.content:
Hello,

one of our customers is asking, if it's possible to add Mercateo in Ariba Buying, Base Edition (not classic Ariba Buying) as Marketplace.

We only find the answer for adding Amazon as a Marketplace in Ariba Buying, Base Edition.

BR

entry.title: Re: Edit IN MM01/MM01 FIELD MBEW-BKLAS
entry.content:
Hello @Thais_Ortega 

There is no standard enhancement that would allow prepopulation of valuation class based on material group. You could do that with a material master custom screen. But I don't think it's worth the effort.

Use either BADI_MATERIAL_CHECK or EXIT_SAPLMGMU_001 to validate material master before saving.

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Re: Binding transfer problem
entry.content:
@bill_froelichI think found what's going on.

The page of DataTable is inside a Tab of a Tabs Page.

If I use directly the Page whit the DataTable and made the same things, the binding transfer works fine.

When the DataTable is inside a Tabs Page the issue occurs.

P.s.: i opened also a SAP Incident Case for a different problem on Modal Page that close itself without no reason and happens also when I use Tabs Page (Case 1158978/2024) if you can access can you take a look please ?

Thank you.

entry.title: Re: SEPA SDD ITALY with schema CBIBdySDDReq.00.01.01
entry.content: Hi, how did you solve it?

entry.title: SAP GUI silent uninstallation package to remove the 32 bit SAP GUI from all laptops/desktops
entry.content: Please check and provide SAP GUI silent uninstallation package to remove the 32 bit SAP GUI from all laptops/desktops

entry.title: Re: SAP BW DTP dynamic filter multiple fields
entry.content: The note is old (but gold) indeed, but the RSBKADMIN is still valid for 7.50.

entry.title: Re: Convert Sapi Source system to ODP source system
entry.content:
Yes but only whole dataflows can be converted. This means, that cubes and classic DSO-s are converted to ADSO-s. Multiproviders, Infosets are converted to HCPR and so on.

But you can also try the following:

  1. Create the new ODP source system.
  2. Put a single datasource of the SAPI source system on a transport.
  3. In RSLOGSYSMAP map the SAPI source system to the new ODP source system.
  4. Import the transport created in step 2 back into the same system
  5. If successful the datasource will be imported to the new ODP source system

Note that the existing deltas will not work with the newly created ODP datasources. They need to be newly initialized.

entry.title: Re: Extensibility of Thailand Withholding Tax Report - 50BIS
entry.content: Great article. Thanks for your instruction!

entry.title: Re: Finding the right CDS Extractor in SAP S/4HANA
entry.content:
Hi Jens, unfortunately, the CDS extractors do not read from achives generated by tr. SARA. The data needs to be available on the HANA platform, however SARA generates offline archives.  Same applied for S-API extractors in the past. 
Regards - Frank

entry.title: Re: Download path of Payment Media in Public Cloud
entry.content: deleted comment

entry.title: Re: Download path of Payment Media in Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hi Felix,

So far, I didn't get any good solution for this unfortunately.

Basically, file download from Fiori apps triggers browser download, so file path depends on each user's browser setting.

In some cases, extension using scope item "2YM" could be a solution (while this item requires Cash Management license).
This scope item activates an API which passes payment media files to middleware via SOAP.
This solution could be adopted if the costs of these additional license and extension are accepted.

Best regards,
Tomoyoshi

entry.title: Re: Introducing the new Adaptation Editor experience for SAPUI5 adaptation projects
entry.content:
Hi! 

Great news, I am excited to try it! 

From what version of Fiori Tools will this be available?

entry.title: Schedule on fix hour replication flow based on S/4HANA CDS View
entry.content:
Hi expert,

We are implemented a Datasphere project for our customer and facing an issue where we were not able to schedule the delta load for a replication flow.

We can launch init + Delta, select delta intervall (for expample every 24h), but not choose à fix hour during the night.

Do you know if this function will be available in datasphere ?

Thanks a lot,

Regards, Bruno

entry.title: Inbound and outboud IP Ranges SAP ByD and C4C
entry.content:
You want to know the IP ranges for in and outbound in SAP Business By Design.

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Inbound and outboud IP Ranges SAP ByD and C4C
entry.content:
We provide dynamic IP Ranges only and no statis IP's

 

https://userapps.support.sap.com/sap/support/knowledge/en/2570539

https://userapps.support.sap.com/sap/support/knowledge/en/2829404

entry.title: SAC Excel Exclude Option
entry.content:
Hi 

We are trying to upload a list of Cost Centers into the SAC Excel filter function and then exclude them for the report.

IT is possible to upload the list but it is not possible to upload them and exclude them - the system will only accept the upload as Select Member only (4) . You then have to go through the long list and select "exclude" for each one. 

IN SAP AFO you can upload a list and prefix with "!" which acts as the exclude function 

We did try dimension override function in excel but the option "6" does not exist or is allowed 

 

Question 

Has anyone found a way of uploading and excluding automatically for a long list of members 

 

Thanks

 

Russell

entry.title: Re: SAP FI tax codes transport - Best practices and tips
entry.content:
Very good summary instructions!! Thank you.

 

I am doing the process and I have encounter an issue with the Table Key Simulation for T007V which one should I use ? I see the ones for T007S and T007A but in the transport order, they ask me also for one and I do not manage to fill it . I get several error message.

Is it possible to continue the topic here ?

entry.title: Re: HANA Service Layer SBOBobService.GetItemPrice
entry.content:
Hi Ankit,
Thank you for pointing out the service layer endpoint to get ItemPrice. However, on both Service Layer and DI-API it is taking alot of time when you want to get price for multiple items as it takes one item at a time to get the price. Is there any way you could provide a consolidated query where the internal logics are applied how the price is being calculated. That way We will be able to get multiple item prices for a business partner in one go.

entry.title: Re: A few updates from SAP Business One Support
entry.content:
This link worked for me (after authenticating in learning hub):
https://saplearninghub.plateau.com/learning/user/learning/launchOnlineContentFromLearningPlan.do?actionName=launchContent&catalogAction=launchContent&componentID=PSD_WEB_00006530&componentTypeID=EXPERT_LED&fromDeepLink=true&fromSF=Y&menuGroup=Learning&menuItem=Cur&revisionDate=1716487403000&revisionDateMilliseconds=1716487403000#/5FE68B8A994058EB18005D421029939A

entry.title: Hi Does anyone have sample code of asset reversal in AB0
entry.content: Hi Does anyone have sample code of asset reversal in AB08 ?

entry.title: ME21N CHECK ON WARNING RED-LIGHTS NEEDS TO STOP THE PORCESS OF CREATING PO ORDER
entry.content:
Hey folks,

We are trying to solve an issue during the creation of a Purchase Order (PO).
As per the standard, when we add materials to the line items, the system provides traffic light indicators.

The only available BAdI (ME_PROCESS_PO_CUST) does not stop the program when attempting to check these indicators.

The goal is that if the traffic lights are "red," meaning error messages, the program should NOT save the document.

i'll show below step by step.
1) We add one material 

2) press "Save"

3) then my BADI ME_PROCESS_PO_CUST is activated.
and it's shows the message that it should stop the TCode of PO.

4) Pressing "F8" an it's appear the pop-up that we can chose if we can proceed further with the PO.

5) the issue is that we should not proceed with the "hold" button because we have the red-lights "red", but my check on step 3 is not stopping the Parking of the PO.

you folks have any ideas how to break the creation of the PO?

thanks in advance for your collab,

G. & E.
